title: ESCC HUD / statusline bridge contract
description: Shape of the session-bridge file (escc-metrics-${sessionId}.json) that post:metrics-bridge writes and escc-statusline.js reads. The bridge is the SINGLE statusline metrics source (Amendment A.4 — there is no harness-cost-<id>.json). All fields are optional/additive; readers must tolerate missing keys.

total_cost_usd.description: Cumulative session cost in USD (rendered as $N.NN).

tool_count.description: Tool calls this session (rendered as Nt).

files_modified_count.description: Distinct files written/edited this session (rendered as Nf).

files_modified.description: Distinct file paths touched this session.

first_timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of the first tool call; drives the duration segment (Nm).

context_remaining_pct.description: Raw remaining context % from Claude Code, written back by the statusline for context-monitor to read.

persona.description: Active sales persona (sdr | ae | sales-manager | revops). Overridden by the ESCC_PERSONA env var if set.

workspace_name.description: Rep workspace / account label shown in the persona/workspace segment; falls back to the directory basename.
